issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.
Skill assumes Node.js and browser environments, limiting cross-platform usage.

scenarios.name: Send a USDC transfer from a Node.js backend
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses ethers v6 JsonRpcProvider, Wallet(privateKey, provider), Contract with ERC20 ABI, parseUnits('100', 6), connect(wallet), and awaits tx.wait(); baseline mixes v5 syntax or skips tx.wait, which the guidelines explicitly warn against.

scenarios.name: Read an account's USDC balance from a dApp frontend with MetaMask
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses ethers.BrowserProvider(window.ethereum), getSigner, the ERC20 ABI with balanceOf/decimals, and formatUnits per the v6 patterns; baseline often uses deprecated Web3Provider/v5 calls and skips decimals scaling.
